name: rp2040_timer_mailbox_s3jtag
notes: No-wire RP2040 timer self-test for the S3JTAG bench. The DUT arms a 100 ms repeating timer and reports PASS through the AEL mailbox after 10 callbacks. No TARGETIN, UART, or local loopback jumper is required.

bench_setup.notes: No-wire RP2040 Stage 1 self-test. Requires only SWDIO, SWCLK, and GND. No UART, TARGETIN, or local loopback jumper is required.

peripheral_signals.notes: RP2040 repeating timer callback fires every 100 ms and increments the mailbox detail counter.
Visual only. Toggles while the timer test is running and after mailbox PASS is written.
